author: y4rr
content: [action] Phase 7 dispatch: SE block primitive + MobileNetV2/V3-Small + EfficientNet-B0 model migrations. 4 deliverables. Probe-before-fix on each non-trivial migration. Block-config tables translated from torchvision. Stochastic depth: eval-mode pass-through, backward separate finding. STOP-AND-REPORT per model on unexpected divergence. ResNet50/ViT/etc. existing 8 PASSes must preserve.
